intended_use: ClearRead CT™ is comprised of computer assisted reading tools designed to aid the radiologist in the detection of pulmonary nodules during review of CT examinations of the chest on an asymptomatic pop
intended_use_full: ClearRead CT™ is comprised of computer assisted reading tools designed to aid the radiologist in the detection of pulmonary nodules during review of CT examinations of the chest on an asymptomatic population. The ClearRead CT requires both lungs be in the field of view. ClearRead CT provides adjunctive information and is not intended to be used without the original CT series.
other_metrics: Area under the curve (AUC) of localization receiver operating characteristic (LROC) response; read time reduction reported but specific values not provided. ClearRead CT was found to significantly increase AUC relative to unaided read, and decrease read times with and without outliers.
